ocr_findings.trace: Known recurring Mistral OCR defect on the 「試験にココが出る！」callout banner — the stylized 'ココ' glyph is consistently misread as 'はつし'. Same defect observed on p200 (this audit) and previously documented. Cleaner / structurer drop this banner line, so structured/translated/output entities are unaffected.
ocr_findings.recommended_fix: Add Stage 2/3 regex normalization: replace '試験にはつしが出る' → '試験にココが出る' (idempotent post-OCR fixup). Not release-blocking since callout is stripped before structuring.
